summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Baillie Gifford International Concentrated Growth ETF (BGCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed international equity ETF that invests in a concentrated portfolio of companies with long-term growth potential. The fund focuses primarily on businesses outside the US across both developed and emerging markets. BGCG was launched on Dec 14, 2017 and is issued by Baillie Gifford Funds.

holdings.infoBox: BGCG is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.64%, MercadoLibre at 9.53%, Spotify Technology at 8.33%, ASML Holding at 5.80%, and NVIDIA at 4.57%.
